title: Yijing Hexagram 46: Sheng (Pushing Upward)
description: Hexagram 46 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 46 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Pushing Upward has supreme success. One must see the great man. Fear not. Departure toward the south brings good fortune.
